testcase.name: beforeTest

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Could not find a connected Android device in 20000ms Host info: host: 'DHARSHANJAYAPAL', ip: '192.168.1.101' Build info: version: '4.13.0', revision: 'ba948ece5b*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25.0.2' Driver info: io.appium.java_client.android.AndroidDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[{appium:noReset=true, appium:udid=mvs4gu4tkfytuosw, appium:uiautomator2ServerLaunchTimeout=120000, appium:autoGrantPermissions=false, appium:adbExecTimeout=120000, appium:ignoreHiddenApiPolicyError=true, appium:appActivity=com.android.contacts.activities.TwelveKeyDialer, appium:deviceName=Android, platformName=ANDROID, appium:automationName=UiAutomator2, appium:skipDeviceInitialization=true, appium:appPackage=com.android.contacts}], desiredCapabilities=Capabilities {appium:adbExecTimeout: 120000, appium:appActivity: com.android.contacts.activi..., appium:appPackage: com.android.contacts, appium:autoGrantPermissions: false, appium:automationName: UiAutomator2, appium:deviceName: Android, appium:ignoreHiddenApiPolicyError: true, appium:noReset: true, appium:skipDeviceInitialization: true, appium:udid: mvs4gu4tkfytuosw, appium:uiautomator2ServerLaunchTimeout: 120000, platformName: ANDROID}}] Capabilities {appium:adbExecTimeout: 120000, appium:appActivity: com.android.contacts.activi..., appium:appPackage: com.android.contacts, appium:autoGrantPermissions: false, appium:automationName: UiAutomator2, appium:deviceName: Android, appium:ignoreHiddenApiPolicyError: true, appium:noReset: true, appium:skipDeviceInitialization: true, appium:udid: mvs4gu4tkfytuosw, appium:uiautomator2ServerLaunchTimeout: 120000, platformName: ANDROID}
